description:
## Features
- Added a `Clipboard columns` setting to switch the clipboard grid between `1 / 2 (default) / 3` columns.
- Added `Show order index` to display order labels such as `[1]`, `[2]`, and so on above each clipboard item.
- Added `Order index direction` to switch the numbering order between ascending and descending.
## Note
- Currently supports only the official Gboard 17.0.10.880768217-release-arm64-v8a.

## 功能
- 新增 Clipboard columns 設定，可在 1 / 2（預設）/ 3 欄之間切換剪貼簿欄數。
- 新增 Show order index，可在每個剪貼簿項目上方顯示 [1]、[2] 等順序編號。
- 新增 Order index direction，可切換編號是正序還是倒序。
## 注意
- 目前只支援官方 Gboard 17.0.10.880768217-release-arm64-v8a
